Paper-facing reward-component ablation requires separately trained no-redundancy, no-validity, no-verifier, and coverage-only variants on the same hard-gold protocol, with training_done.json recording the verifier env for each trained variant. Verifier-filter ablation evidence must show that filtering does not increase hallucination and does not collapse semantic coverage. C7 fails closed if same-output re-scoring is the only reward-component evidence.
